name: Xun
description: Cosmos attacker with unhurried, orbital pacing—damage arrives in reliable beats, fitting neatly beside other starlit Cosmos allies without demanding complex setups.

seo.title: Xun — Attack
seo.description: Xun provides Cosmos attack power in Neverness to Everness—measured damage, star-themed identity, and a straightforward striker for mixed Cosmos lineups.
